extension.description: Automatically generate Git Commit messages using AI large language models
command.generateCommitMessage: AI Git Commiter: Generate Commit Message
command.addPrompt: AI Git Commiter: Add Prompt Template
command.editPrompt: AI Git Commiter: Edit Prompt Template
command.deletePrompt: AI Git Commiter: Delete Prompt Template
command.selectPrompt: AI Git Commiter: Select Prompt Template
command.downloadPrompts: AI Git Commiter: Download Remote Prompts
command.manualPolish: AI Git Commiter: Manual Polish Commit Message
command.switchModel: AI Git Commiter: Switch AI Model
config.language.description: Language for generated Git Commit messages (Default: 简体中文)
config.provider.enum.openai: Generate commit messages using OpenAI or OpenAI-compatible API
config.provider.enum.gemini: Generate commit messages using Google Gemini API
config.provider.enum.anthropic: Generate commit messages using Anthropic or Anthropic-compatible API (supports services like Zhipu)
config.thinkingMode.description: Thinking mode type. Use together with 'Enable reasoning/thinking mode' (Default: disabled)
config.thinkingMode.enum.disabled: Do not enable thinking mode. Compatible with standard OpenAI and most providers.
config.thinkingMode.enum.standard: New standard OpenAI reasoning API (reasoning_effort), suitable for o1/o3 official models.
config.thinkingMode.enum.legacy: Legacy standard API. Passes enable_thinking: true/false directly. Suitable for some compatible providers.
config.userAgent.description: Custom User-Agent for requests. Leave empty to use SDK default. Some providers might block default User-Agents.
config.gitDiff.area.description: Generate commit message using changes from Staged or Working area (Default: auto)
config.gitDiff.area.enum.auto: Automatically select Staged or Working area changes (Staged prioritized)
config.gitDiff.wordDiff.description: Show word-level differences instead of line-level to reduce redundant content (Default: true)
config.gitDiff.unified.description: Remove context lines, keeping only actual changes (Default: 0)
config.gitDiff.noColor.description: Remove color codes to avoid extra token costs (Default: true)
config.gitDiff.diffFilter.description: Filter file change types: A(Add), C(Copy), D(Delete), M(Modify), R(Rename), T(Type change) (Default: ACDMRT)
config.gitDiff.filterMeta.description: Filter out redundant meta info lines (Default: false)
config.gitDiff.maxChanges.description: Max line changes for AI suggestion. Exceeding this will prompt manual input or reducing staged files. (Default: 500)
config.prompt.enableProjectPerception.de: Enable project context perception. When enabled, project context docs (like CLAUDE.md) will be read automatically. (Default: false)
config.prompt.projectInfoPath.descriptio: Path to project context doc. Leave empty to auto-detect CLAUDE.md, .cursorrules or project-context.md in root.
